section_name: Use of Engineer or Engineering Firm
text:
(a) To act as the department’s representative, independent of a design-build contractor, for the procurement process and for the duration of the work on a highway project, the department shall select or designate:

(1) an engineer;

(2) a qualified firm, selected in accordance with Section 2254.004 (Contract for Professional Services of Architect, Engineer, or Surveyor) , Government Code, who is independent of the design-build contractor; or

(3) a general engineering consultant that was previously selected by the department and is selected or designated in accordance with Section 2254.004 (Contract for Professional Services of Architect, Engineer, or Surveyor) , Government Code.

(b) The selected or designated engineer or firm has full responsibility for complying with Chapter 1001 (Texas Board of Professional Engineers and Land Surveyors) , Occupations Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 223. Bids & Contracts for Highway Projects
##### § 223.243 — Use of Engineer or Engineering Firm

(a) To act as the department’s representative, independent of a design-build contractor, for the procurement process and for the duration of the work on a highway project, the department shall select or designate:

    (1) an engineer;

    (2) a qualified firm, selected in accordance with Section 2254.004 (Contract for Professional Services of Architect, Engineer, or Surveyor) , Government Code, who is independent of the design-build contractor; or

    (3) a general engineering consultant that was previously selected by the department and is selected or designated in accordance with Section 2254.004 (Contract for Professional Services of Architect, Engineer, or Surveyor) , Government Code.

(b) The selected or designated engineer or firm has full responsibility for complying with Chapter 1001 (Texas Board of Professional Engineers and Land Surveyors) , Occupations Code.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 34, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: To act as the department’s representative, independent of a design-build contractor, for the procurement process and for the duration of the work on a highway project, the department shall select or designate:

a qualified firm, selected in accordance with Section 2254.004 (Contract for Professional Services of Architect, Engineer, or Surveyor) , Government Code, who is independent of the design-build contractor; or

a general engineering consultant that was previously selected by the department and is selected or designated in accordance with Section 2254.004 (Contract for Professional Services of Architect, Engineer, or Surveyor) , Government Code.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The selected or designated engineer or firm has full responsibility for complying with Chapter 1001 (Texas Board of Professional Engineers and Land Surveyors) , Occupations Code.
